extraction.one_line_summary: COLBRELLI attacked with 200m remaining in the sprint, holding off late surges from DÉMARE and COQUARD despite going far too early.
tactical_patterns: COLBRELLI opened his sprint at 200m, significantly earlier than optimal, yet superior power compensated for poor timing.
GROENEWEGEN's leadout from WAGNER collapsed as sprinters waited too long, allowing an unattached COLBRELLI to exploit hesitation.
KRISTOFF positioned patiently but failed to launch, suggesting form issues when waiting tactics should favor explosive finishers.

rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: positive: First WorldTour year with Bahrain-Merida, won despite launching 200m out and being isolated without teammates
rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: neutral: Strong late acceleration in yellow jersey but hesitated fractionally too long behind early COLBRELLI move
rider_signals.COQUARD Bryan: neutral: Fast finish but tactical delay cost podium against weaker COLBRELLI premature sprint
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: Lost from prime position behind WAGNER leadout, indicating either positioning failure or insufficient sprint power
rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: negative: Patient positioning wasted, failed to launch despite ideal tactical setup for explosive closer
rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: neutral: Visible in finale positioning for Quick-Step but no final punch delivered
